message:
🐛 Fix marketplace sidebar duplicate entries (#832)

- Install: Skip adding sidebar entry if one with same href already exists
- Remove: Clear ALL matching sidebar entries (not just first), preventing
  orphaned duplicates from accumulating

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
